title: MidoMika - SuperHighWay
description:
Are you tired of navigating between large buildings in the Minecraft world?
Finding boat travel too cumbersome? Look no further – the SuperHighway

plugin is the solution you've been searching for!
body:
Are you tired of navigating between large buildings in the Minecraft world? Finding boat travel too cumbersome? Look no further – the SuperHighway plugin is the solution you've been searching for!





  • Minecarts can run on white and black wool, providing more control for your transportation system.

  • Adjust gears from 0 to 3 by holding a Diamond. Otherwise, operation will limit to Gear 1.

  • Placing red wool triggers emergency braking for the Minecart, adding variety and challenge to your actions.

  • Leash and transport various creatures with ease! Creatures including cow, sheep, chicken, cat, and villager can be leashed and transported by your minecarts.



  • To leashed creature, player need to hold Diamond to right - click on a creature to make it become leashed creature for the player.

  • Place a minecart nearby the leashed creature, then player need to hold Diamond and right - click on the leashed creature. The nearby minecart will be pull and collect the creature by itself.

  • Now player may place another minecart and drive near to the minecart which carry all leashed creatures. Those leashed creature minecarts will follow the player automatically.

  • To unleashed creature, player need to hold Diamond to Shift + right - click to deselect a creature as a leashed creature.

With the SuperHighway plugin, enhance your Minecraft experience with greater transportation freedom and enjoyment!

If you enjoy my project and appreciate SPM plugins, you can show your support by visiting https://www.paypal.com/paypalme/MidoMika. Your contributions enable me to develop more engaging SMP plugins and enhance your Minecraft experience. Thank you for your support!
